task: place the yellow object on top of the drawer
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A white drawer is open, revealing a yellow object inside. A white tray is on the countertop. The drawer is a rigid container with a front edge; the yellow object is a small, solid item. **STRATEGY -** Reach the drawer, grasp the yellow object, transport it to the tray, and place it there. Failure modes include dropping the object or misplacing it. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1 reach drawer front edge; Step 2 grasp yellow object (body); Step 3 transport to tray; Step 4 place on tray.

Goal: on(yellow_object, tray); stable(yellow_object)
Scene: yellow_object, drawer, tray, countertop
Step 1: reach(drawer)
  affordance_region: the front edge of the open drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, drawer, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, drawer) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_object)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow object
  contact: holding(yellow_object) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_object)
Step 3: transport(yellow_object -> tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white tray
  spatial: above(yellow_object, tray, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_object)
  done_when: above(yellow_object, tray, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_object -> tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white tray
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_object, tray) [completion]; released(yellow_object) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_object) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_object, tray) AND released(yellow_object)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the front edge of the open drawer
the body of the yellow object
an empty area on the white tray
an empty area on the white tray
